Plaintiff Zombie Inc'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Guy W. Stilson, Low Ball & Lynch, 415.981.6630, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Steven Kaufhold, Kaufhold Gaskin, 415.944.9402, appearing for the Defendant.

Ruling: A R G U E D; Plaintiff Zombie Inc's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests is taken under submission. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Plaintiff Zombie Inc'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Guy W. Stilson, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630, for plaintiff and moving party;
Jonathan Gaskin, Esq. of Kaufhold Gaskin LLP, Tel. 415.944.9403, for defendant and opposing party.

The court signed a stipulation and order submitted by the parties requesting that this matter be continued. Plaintiff Zombie Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests is continued to October 24, 2012 at 9:00 am in Dept. 302. Pro Tem Judge: James Watson, Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Plaintiff Zombie Inc'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Guy W. Stilson, Low Ball & Lynch, 415.981.6630, appearing for the Plaintiff.
Steven Kaufhold, Kaufhold Gaskin LLP, 415.944.9402, appearing for the Defendant.

Per stipulation of the parties the matter is continued. Plaintiff Zombie Inc's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests is continued to October 2, 2012 at 9:00 am. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF ZOMBIE INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Decovery Requests is GRANTED. Defendant Gree International, Inc. shall produce documents responsive to Plaintiff Zombie, Inc.'s Requests for Production of Documents, Set Two, and a privilege log listing documents withheld on a claim of privilege within 21 days. Prevailing party is to prepare the form of order. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not reported. =302/JPT
